summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Abdul Azis Portfolio website. All backend APIs and frontend features tested successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ returns running message (200)
Backend: POST /api/contact persists contact message with id and created_at (200)
Backend: GET /api/contact returns saved messages (200)
Backend: POST /api/contact rejects invalid email (422)
Backend: POST /api/contact rejects missing fields (422)
Frontend: Hero state renders on load with all elements (name, typing animation, buttons, social icons, scroll indicator)
Frontend: 'My Portfolio' button smooth-scrolls to projects section
Frontend: Scroll indicator smooth-scrolls to projects section
Frontend: After scrolling, sidebar navigation and top header appear
Frontend: All sidebar navigation links work (Home, Projects, Experience, Tech Stack, Education, Contact)
Frontend: Theme toggle switches between dark/light mode and persists in localStorage
Frontend: Projects section displays 4 project cards
Frontend: Project Detail button opens modal with 4 screenshots in 2x2 grid
Frontend: Project modal contains Live Demo and Go to Website buttons
Frontend: Experience section renders correctly
Frontend: Tech Stack section renders correctly
Frontend: Education section renders correctly
Frontend: Contact form shows validation errors for empty submission
Frontend: Contact form shows validation error for invalid email
Frontend: Contact form successfully posts to /api/contact with valid data (200)
Frontend: Contact form integration with backend API working correctly
notes: Minor console warnings present (DialogContent missing Description - accessibility warning, not functional issue)
Custom cursor glow feature working as designed (hidden on touch devices)
WhatsApp external navigation not tested as per instructions (only verified API call)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Theme persistence working correctly with localStorage
Smooth scroll animations working across all navigation
